pageContext.name: Gore Magala Creator's Model
pageContext.description: Gore Magala, a terrifying monster first introduced in Monster Hunter 4, makes its way to the Capcom Figure Builder - Creator's Kit line!  Gore Magala stands poised, ready and eager for battle amid a rocky landscape, its unique physiology on full display, six limbs and wings tensed, and jaw parted in a defiant roar that shows off its dangerous teeth.  This PVC figure, officially manufactured and released by Capcom, stands just over 8 inches tall, making it an imposing display that can fit almost anywhere- a perfect mix of form and function.  Add this bizarre wyvern to your Monser Hunter collection today!
